creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
See Dubai from above in these attractions:

💙 Sky Views Observatory - for Burj Khalifa view, glass walk and glass slide

🎡 Ain Dubai - the world’s highest observation wheel for views for Palm Jumeirah and Marina area

🖼️ Dubai Frame - the world’s largest frame for glass walk and good views of Old and New Dubai 

🏙️ At The Top - iconic Burj Khalifa experience

🌴 The View at The Palm - 360 degree views of Palm Jumeirah 

Save this for your Dubai trip!

Dubai Travel • Dubai Observation Decks • Dubai Destinations • Where to go in Dubai • Dubai Attractions • Lady and her Sweet Escapes
